query:
SELECT 
  j.id,
  j.label,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as platform_count
FROM jurisdictions j
LEFT JOIN platforms p ON JSON_CONTAINS(p.jurisdiction, JSON_QUOTE(j.id)) AND p.status = 'published'
GROUP BY j.id, j.label
ORDER BY j.sortOrder;
